text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I walk into the cafeteria, I spot Sakura
Chiyono O eating a manju.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hi, Trainer! Would you like a manju?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
They turned out really well today! I came across a
video of how a professional boils the red beans
and tried my best to copy the method!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's amazing how delicious they came out after
tweaking the cooking process a little.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I love making desserts, so when I find an area I
need to improve, my motivation skyrockets! Of
course, the same goes for training.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm planning to make even more manju tomorrow,
so I bought a lot of red beans!
choice_data_list: Be careful not to overeat, though.

It's good to hone your skills. Churn out a
massive batch!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh... That's a good point. I almost got carried
away there.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I know! I can just share the manju I make with my
class and dormmates!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I hope they'll like them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, everyone thanks Sakura Chiyono O
for her manju, making her grin with pride the
whole day.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You're right! The more I make, the more I'll
improve! I'm going to make and eat loads of
manju!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Japanese desserts tend to contain less fat
compared to Western desserts, so I don't have to
worry as much while eating them!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I'm a fan of Japanese desserts! All
right, I'm going to eat to my heart's content
tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Sakura Chiyono O joyfully chows
down on a great deal of Japanese desserts.
